tips: bun run neorwc.ts — run the CLI directly in source mode
bun build --compile — create a standalone executable binary
bun add <pkg> — install npm packages faster than npm
Bun ships with a built-in test runner: bun test
Bun.Glob is faster than glob npm package
Import .txt files directly with import syntax or Bun.file()
bunx <pkg> — run npm packages without installing
Bun's native fetch API works in both source and compiled mode
Use bun:sqlite for zero-config embedded databases
bun run dev — start the dev workflow from package.json scripts
